person.name: Elizabeth
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
https://www.wikitree.com/wiki/Unknown-564220
Biography

Elizabeth _______ . The erroneous surname Lincoln is based on the fact that her husband Richard Tootill was witness to the will of Elizabeth Lyncoln in 1556 and that he soon married her. This is pure coincidence. Elizabeth Lyncoln died shortly about 1556. [1] The surname Southcott has also been proposed with no supporting evidence.

Richard Tootill of Woodford, was born say 1530. His will was made 1589 and proved 11 Mar 1590 at Peterborough and named seven children and his wife Elizabeth who was executrix along with their son Anthony. Their 7 children were: Symon, Anthony, Elizabeth, Ellen, Mary, Frances, and Thomas.[2][3]

Richard and Elizabeth were married about 1558. [4]

Based on her husband's birth, 1530, the estimated birth of Symon, 1560, Elizabeth may have been born 1535-1540 ish.

Sources
↑ May be WPW Phillimore. Calendar of Wills Relating to Northamptonshire & Rutland 1510-1652. London, England: Chas J Clark, 1888. p. 60 col 1
↑ Hale, House and Related Families- Donald Lines Jacobus, Connecticut Historical Society, Hartford, 1952, p. 771
↑ Cleaver, William Jessup, Ancestry of Allen Grinnell Cleaver and Martha Irene Jessup, Gateway Press, Baltimore, 1989
↑ Mildred Bradford, Moses S. Curtis Descendants and Ancestors, Baltimore, 2000, page 167.

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth于1547年1月31日出生在英国戴文蕾托 波福。她于大约1560年与Richard Tootil Tuttle在英国諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1589年3月11日之后在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth was born on 31 January 1547, in Little Bovey, Devon, England. She married Richard Tootil Tuttle about 1560, in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 11 March 1589, in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth est née le 31 janvier 1547, à Little Bovey, Devon, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Tootil Tuttle environ 1560, à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 11 mars 1589, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth wurde am 31. Januar 1547 in Little Bovey, Devon, England geboren. Sie hat um 1560 in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England Richard Tootil Tuttle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 11. März 1589 in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth è nata il il 31 gennaio 1547 nel Little Bovey, Devon, England. Lei sposato Richard Tootil Tuttle circa 1560, nel Woodford, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 11 marzo 1589, nel Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabethは1547年1月31日にイギリスデボンリットル ボビーで生まれた。約1560年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードでRichard Tootil Tuttleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1589年3月11日以後にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth(은)는 1547년 1월 31일 영국 데폰 리틀 보비에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1560년 영국 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에서 Richard Tootil Tuttle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1589년 3월 11일 이후 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nasceu em 31 de janeiro de 1547, em Little Bovey, Devon, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Tootil Tuttle aproximadamente 1560, em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 11 de março de 1589, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth родилась 31 января 1547 г. в местности литл бови, девон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Tootil Tuttle около 1560 г. в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 11 марта 1589 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 11 de marzo de 1589, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
